summary: Exact clean HEAD passes architecture-boundary preflight. The implementation remains owned by run-session, adds no run-session-to-cli reverse dependency, composes the existing production connectors and independent-review orchestration, and preserves explicit human authority for external actions.
inspection_summary: Inspected all origin/main...HEAD changed paths under regression_guard and path_surface_coverage. Design SSOT links the Story to architecture, test plan, and topology replay. The one-command owner has no CLI import; guarded-run-session composes it through injected readiness, PR preparation, runtime dispatch, and existing independent-review boundaries. Current evidence records conformance 80 versus origin/main 81, zero new run-session-to-cli reverse dependencies, targeted 290/290, integration 4/4, and E2E 4/4.
judgment_delta: Initial concern that persisted PR preparation referenced an earlier HEAD was resolved for the architecture verdict by exact-HEAD review inputs and dedicated 56d69700 verification and conformance artifacts. PR readiness still requires current preparation after this review.
